response.original_title: Listers: A Glimpse Into Extreme Birdwatching
response.overview: Listers: A Glimpse Into Extreme Birdwatching follows brothers Owen and Quentin Reiser as they attempt a Big Year, a birdwatching term for an attempt to observe as many species of bird as possible in a calendar year. The film received positive reviews.
response.tagline: Two brothers dive into competitive birdwatching, living in a van for a year while traveling across the country to participate in a Big Year contest.
response.title: Listers: A Glimpse Into Extreme Birdwatching
